calculation_notes: Controlled manual input for the frozen Nagarjuna Sagar case.
True Lahiri/Chitrapaksha ayanamsha and true lunar nodes.
Apparent geocentric positions; refraction disabled; aberration, deflection, and nutation enabled.

review_notes: Migrated from the approved evidence set merged through Astro PR #24.
D1 and D9 signs each matched 10 of 10.
This is Source 1 only; a second independent source remains required for this case.

policy_notes: Internal JPL regression baselines never count as independent external evidence.
A case is externally validated only after two distinct approved external source IDs are committed.
Every approved record must retain reviewer identity, review time, source provenance, file path, and SHA-256 digest.
Disagreements are resolved from calculation contracts and source settings, not majority vote.
